name: mining
description: /mining — lens-driven DIVERGENCE (add leaves) + connect-driven CONVERGENCE (add edges) + tidy-driven ORGANIZE (phase regroup) workflow as a slash command. Sibling 3rd pillar to /domain (snapshot · log · MINING). File pair — <NAME>.mining.md (## cycles · ## leaves · ## edges) + <NAME>.mining.tape (idea cart of @X candidates). THREE workflows: **lens cycles** (divergence — apply a lens, add new leaves; depletion = 0 new leaves) · **connect cycles** (convergence — find meaningful direct edges between accumulated leaves, excluding trivial-transitive / re-packaging / generic-ancestor; depletion = 0 new edges in a full pass) · **tidy** (organize — reorganize accumulated cycles into PHASE groups: divergence/analysis/convergence/external, plus a chronological cycle-index table that preserves order LOSSLESSLY). Together mining = (leaves, edges) graph that gets periodically tidied into a navigable phase-structured doc. Bundled lens catalogue (extensible `~/.sidecar/lens/<name>.md`): **same-formula** · **ouroboros** (self-reference → goal closure) · **dimensional** · **tension** · **combinatorial** · **custom**. Verbs (12): bare `/mining` (status with edge count + auto-suggest tidy at ≥10 cycles & ≥500 lines) · `/mining <lens>` (divergence round) · `/mining append <text>` · `/mining cycle new <title>` · `/mining depletion` · `/mining tree` · `/mining connect` or `/mining edges` (convergence round) · `/mining connect <a> <b>` (justify or (no-edge)) · `/mining graph` (ASCII (leaves, edges) graph + stats) · `/mining saturate` (auto-loop connect, cap 5 inner passes) · `/mining tidy` or `/mining consolidate` [`--depth=light|full`] (lossless phase-group reorganize: light = header+index, full = body regroup) · `/mining squash` (cosmetic dup-header dedup only, low-risk pre-step). Active-domain only (commons @D g58). Cycles append-only; tidy rearranges but never discards (index table preserves chronology). Derived from demiurge RTSC's 15-cycle organic emergence + Cycle 15 phase-grouping reorg. NL triggers — '/mining', '/mining <lens>', 'mining tree', 'mining connect', 'mining graph', 'mining saturate', 'mining tidy', 'mining consolidate', 'mining squash', 'lens 발산', '점잇기', '정리', 'phase 그룹', '마이닝 정리'.
